url.label: GUI URL
url.description: Syncthing GUI base URL. Leave empty to autodetect from config.xml.

api_key.label: API key
api_key.description: Syncthing REST API key. Leave empty to autodetect from config.xml.

config_path.label: config.xml path
config_path.description: Explicit path to Syncthing's config.xml for autodetection.

poll_interval.label: Poll interval (seconds)
poll_interval.description: How often the Syncthing status is refreshed.

folders.label: Monitored folder IDs
folders.description: Folder IDs to monitor. Leave empty to monitor all folders.

insecure_tls.label: Skip TLS verification
insecure_tls.description: Accept self-signed certificates on HTTPS GUI URLs (uses curl -k).

show_pending.label: Show pending count
show_pending.description: Show the number of pending items next to the icon while syncing.

notify_events.label: Event notifications
notify_events.description: Notify when a folder finishes syncing, goes into error, or a device connects/disconnects.

summary.idle-no-devices: Up to date. No remote devices configured.
summary.offline: The Syncthing GUI cannot be reached.
summary.error: One or more folders reported errors.

detail.no-url: The GUI URL could not be resolved from settings or config.xml.
detail.no-api-key: The API key is missing. Set it manually or expose it via config.xml.
